SZNPSS27.bin.changelog: First official roster for SZNPSS 2026-2027 season. This includes the First Rounders of the 2026 Draft, assigned to their respective teams

Portrait Update for 2026-2027 Offseason

sznpss27.bin.changelog:
- Memphis Grizzlies acquire D'Angelo Russell and draft assets. 
- Washington Wizards acquire Khris Middleton (via sign-and-trade from Dallas).
- Detroit Pistons acquire John Collins (via sign-and-trade from the Clippers).
- Milwaukee Bucks acquire Caris LeVert (from the Pistons). 
- Dallas Mavericks acquire Santi Aldama (from the Grizzlies) and Marcus Sasser (from Pistons)
- Detroit Pistons acquire Gary Harris and Taurean Prince (from Bucks)
